def process_orders(orders: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    results = []
    for order in orders:
        total = 0.0
        categories = set()
        for item in order["items"]:
            if item["qty"] > 0:
                total += item["price"] * item["qty"]
                categories.add(item["category"])
        results.append({
            "order_id": order["id"],
            "total": total,
            "categories": list(categories),
        })
    return results

def analyze_logs(log_lines: list[str]) -> list[dict]:
    summaries = []
    for line in log_lines:
        fields = {}
        for p in line.split(","):
            part = p.strip()
            if "=" in part:
                k, v = part.split("=", 1)
                fields[k] = v
        summaries.append(fields)
    return summaries

def transform_records(records: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    output = []
    for record in records:
        cleaned = {}
        text_fields = []
        for k, v in record.items():
            if v is not None:
                cleaned[k] = v.strip() if isinstance(v, str) else v
                if isinstance(v, str):
                    text_fields.append(cleaned[k])
        output.append({"data": cleaned, "text_fields": text_fields})
    return output
